description: One starter short-answer source item with explicit answer-form metadata.

items.stem: Use this starter item as a placeholder and replace the text with the curated short-answer source you want to distill.

solution_steps.label: Restrict the sample space
solution_steps.content: Rewrite the problem in the conditioned sample space.

solution_steps.label: Count the cases
solution_steps.content: Count the conditioned denominator and the intersection numerator.

solution_steps.label: Write the ratio
solution_steps.content: Reduce the conditional probability to its final fraction.

distractors.trigger: When the total sample space is reused after conditioning.
distractors.wrong_move: Divide by the full sample space instead of the conditioned one.
distractors.plausible_choice_shape: A fraction with the original denominator

style_notes: Replace the placeholder stem and answer before distillation.
Keep the required short-answer form explicit in allowed_answer_forms.
